---
title: "Statistics Canada IPPI and RMPI"
author: "Shaho Vatandoust"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: TRUE
    toc_float: TRUE
---

```{r setup, include = F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F)
library(tidyverse); library(cansim); library(kableExtra)

IPPI_groups <- get_cansim("18-10-0265-01")
IPPI_products <- get_cansim("18-10-0266-01")
RMPI <- get_cansim("18-10-0268-01")
```

```{R Cleaning, include = F}
# IPPI ----
df_IPPIgroups <- IPPI_groups %>%
  select(2,6,7) %>%
  filter(year(Date) >= "2006") %>%
  rename(date = Date,
         NAPCS = "North American Product Classification System (NAPCS)",
         value = VALUE) %>%
  mutate(NAPCS = str_remove(NAPCS, "\\s*\\[[^\\]]*\\]"),
         NAPCS = as.factor(NAPCS)) %>%
  group_by(NAPCS) %>%
  mutate(m_change = (value/dplyr::lag(value, 1)-1)*100,
         y_change = (value/dplyr::lag(value, 12)-1)*100) %>%
  ungroup()

df_IPPIproducts <- IPPI_products %>%
  select(2,6,7) %>%
  filter(year(Date) >= "2006") %>%
  rename(date = Date,
         NAPCS = "North American Product Classification System (NAPCS)",
         value = VALUE) %>%
  mutate(NAPCS = str_remove(NAPCS, "\\s*\\[[^\\]]*\\]"),
         NAPCS = as.factor(NAPCS)) %>%
  group_by(NAPCS) %>%
  mutate(m_change = (value/dplyr::lag(value, 1)-1)*100,
         y_change = (value/dplyr::lag(value, 12)-1)*100) %>%
  ungroup()

# RMPI ----
df_RMPI <- RMPI %>%
  select(2,6,7) %>%
  filter(year(Date) >= "2006") %>%
  rename(date = Date,
         NAPCS = "North American Product Classification System (NAPCS)",
         value = VALUE) %>%
  mutate(NAPCS = str_remove(NAPCS, "\\s*\\[[^\\]]*\\]"),
         NAPCS = as.factor(NAPCS)) %>%
  group_by(NAPCS) %>%
  mutate(m_change = (value/dplyr::lag(value, 1)-1)*100,
         y_change = (value/dplyr::lag(value, 12)-1)*100) %>%
  ungroup()

rm(IPPI_groups, IPPI_products, RMPI)
```

# IPPI product groups
## Top Yearly Changes
```{R}
df_IPPIgroups %>% 
  filter(date == "2026-03-01") %>%
  select(2,4,5) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  arrange(desc(y_change)) %>%
  kable(format = "html",
        col.names = c("NAPCS","M/M Change","Y/Y Change")) %>%
  kable_styling()
```

## Top Monthly Changes
```{R}
df_IPPIgroups %>% 
  filter(date == "2026-03-01") %>%
  select(2,4,5) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  arrange(desc(m_change)) %>%
  kable(format = "html",
        col.names = c("NAPCS","M/M Change","Y/Y Change")) %>%
  kable_styling()

```

# IPPI products
## Top 20 Yearly Changes 
```{R}
df_IPPIproducts %>%
  filter(date == "2026-03-01") %>%
  select(2,4,5) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  arrange(desc(y_change)) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  kable(format = "html",
        col.names = c("NAPCS","M/M Change","Y/Y Change")) %>%
  kable_styling()
```

## Top 20 Monthly Changes
```{R}
df_IPPIproducts %>%
  filter(date == "2026-03-01") %>%
  select(2,4,5) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  arrange(desc(m_change)) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  kable(format = "html",
        col.names = c("NAPCS","M/M Change","Y/Y Change")) %>%
  kable_styling()
```

## Bottom 20 Yearly Changes
```{R}
df_IPPIproducts %>%
  filter(date == "2026-03-01") %>%
  select(2,4,5) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  arrange((y_change)) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  kable(format = "html",
        col.names = c("NAPCS","M/M Change","Y/Y Change")) %>%
  kable_styling()
```

## Bottom 20 Monthly Changes
```{R}
df_IPPIproducts %>%
  filter(date == "2026-03-01") %>%
  select(2,4,5) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  arrange((m_change)) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  kable(format = "html",
        col.names = c("NAPCS","M/M Change","Y/Y Change")) %>%
  kable_styling()
```

# RMPI
## Top Yearly Changes
```{R}
df_RMPI %>%
  filter(date == "2026-03-01") %>%
  select(2,4,5) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  arrange(desc(y_change)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(y_change)) %>%
  kable(format = "html",
        col.names = c("NAPCS","M/M Change","Y/Y Change")) %>%
  kable_styling()
```

## Top Monthly Changes
```{R}
df_RMPI %>%
  filter(date == "2026-03-01") %>%
  select(2,4,5) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  arrange(desc(m_change)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(y_change)) %>%
  kable(format = "html",
        col.names = c("NAPCS","M/M Change","Y/Y Change")) %>%
  kable_styling()
```
